analysis.consistency: Consistent. The data adheres to standard spell formatting found in typical D&D 5e spell references.
analysis.quality: High. The entry is complete, detailing all necessary mechanical aspects (level, school, casting time, components, duration, effect, scaling, and class availability).

mechanics.base_effect: Increases HP maximum and current HP by 5 for up to three targets.
mechanics.scaling: Scaling is linear and additive based on spell slot level above 2nd (+5 HP per level above 2nd).
mechanics.clarity: The description is clear, defining the target limit (three), range (30 feet), and duration (8 hours). The component cost (a tiny strip of white cloth) is noted.
mechanics.balance_check: As a 2nd-level spell, providing 15 total temporary HP across three bodies (or 15 HP to one target if cast on only one) for 8 hours is a reasonable level of sustained support.

analysis.potential_issues: None detected. The mechanics are straightforward and well-defined.
